message:
feat(output): add TOON format output mode for token-optimized serialization

Implements TOON (Token-Optimized Object Notation) as a new output format
that reduces token consumption by ~25-35% compared to standard JSON. This
is particularly valuable for AI agents and tools that parse br output.

- Add --format toon option across list, show, search, ready, blocked, stats, dep commands
- Implement OutputFormat and OutputFormatBasic enums with toon variant
- Add toon() and toon_with_stats() methods to OutputContext
- Include optional compression stats with --stats flag
- Add toon crate dependency for TOON serialization
- Fix blocked_issues_cache column reference in get_ready_issues query
- Update schema tests to include all required columns

TOON format preserves full fidelity while using compact tokens and
bracket-free array syntax for reduced token consumption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -48,6 +48,9 @@ crossterm = "0.28"
 # Pinned to commit with let_chains fix for Rust 1.88+ compatibility

+# TOON format support (sibling project)
+toon_rust = { path = "../toon_rust" }
